## What does this PR change?

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and this change is one of the accepted contribution types.
- [ ] **Language sync:** this PR changes an English file that has an Arabic twin
      (`README.md`, `docs/getting-started.md`, `docs/case-study.md`, or content summarized in
      `docs/ar/playbook-overview.ar.md`) → I either updated the twin **or** I am requesting
      maintainer sync by adding the `needs-ar-sync` label.
- [ ] **No private data:** nothing in this PR contains credentials, internal hostnames/paths,
      client-identifying details, or content pasted unsanitized from a private codebase.
- [ ] **Placeholders:** any new `{{PLACEHOLDER}}` token is registered in
      [docs/placeholders.md](../docs/placeholders.md); `examples/` contains no placeholders.
